Descriptif de l'entité et de l'activité

Les systèmes de soins de santé sont confrontés à de profondes transformations. Les attentes des payeurs, les comportements des patients et des professionnels de la santé évoluent rapidement, dans un paysage concurrentiel en pleine mutation. L'augmentation et la consolidation des fabricants de dispositifs médicaux, l'accélération de la transformation numérique - renforcée par la crise de la CoVid-19 - exigent un renforcement de l'alignement et de l'internationalisation de certaines de nos activités.

En réponse à ces défis, l'activité Santé à Domicile a décidé :

d'accélérer la transformation numérique et l'homogénéisation des systèmes d'information à travers le programme TechCARE,

de massifier les activités d'approvisionnement et développer les synergies entre les différentes entités mondiales d'Air Liquide Healthcare (santé à domicile et gaz médicaux).

Pour mettre en œuvre cette stratégie, l'entité Air Liquide Healthcare International Services & Technology (ALHIST) a été créée. Elle est dédiée à l'hébergement des services opérationnels mondiaux partagés, telles que les équipes Digital & IT et Procurement & MedTech.





Quelle sera votre contribution et comment vous épanouir dans ce poste ?



CX Facade is an ecosystem of APIs or Connectors, which represent a set of field mappings and transformation rules for specific data meant to be exported or imported. These connectors enable end-to-end system integrations and data exchanges following the Healthcare-related global standard “FHIR” (Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources) to ensure data interoperability and seamless integration across heterogeneous platforms.

CX Façade is the backbone of data integration between the Salesforce platform and all the other applications of the IT landscape (ERP, MDM, Portals, etc.), through API-Based and middleware-driven integration patterns, using Google Apigee as the API Gateway.

In this context, the Product Owner (PO) Integration Façade is responsible for the full integrations “discovery-delivery” lifecycle, as well as for defining a vision and objectives for the CX Façade as a product used in a portfolio of IT projects, core solutions and country deployments.





Our Company

Air Liquide Healthcare launched its ‘TechCARE’ transformation program 5 years ago. The program aims to increase operational efficiency and launch new, innovative home healthcare offerings by leveraging a global Salesforce platform. This "core model" provides a unified, optimized, patient-centric journey across our operations.

Our platform is a comprehensive ecosystem that includes Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Marketing Cloud, Experience Cloud, Health Cloud, Field Service Management, and Integration Cloud.

Key Responsibilities (What we offer):

Communicating with stakeholders to understand their needs and requirements for data integrations, taking ownership of the end-to-end integration flows , and translating those needs into technical requirements for the development team

Defining rules for logical data mappings logical (data structure) and physical data mappings (actual data paths and formats), including data transformation and routing , through careful analysis of source and target data models, ensuring compliance with FHIR standards

Participating in connector development testing and troubleshooting, including error handling incident analysis, and end-to-end functional validation

Continuously monitoring the performance, reliability and security of the integration platform, including monitoring, alerts, and recommendations for improvements, optimizations, retries and overall stability .

Maintaining an internal detailed catalog of standard “Core” connectors, from a technical and functional perspective, within an “API as a product” approach, that also serves as a convergence tool to limit the API proliferation

Collecting and analyzing user feedback and usage data to perform evolutive and adaptive maintenance to optimize the CX Façade as needed, ensuring compliance with Air Liquide and Salesforce security and performance standards

Managing and communicating a CX Façade product roadmap, including resource needs and budget.





Etes-vous LA personne faite pour ce poste ?

Higher-Education Degree (Master 2)

Strong proficiency in API integration with practical experience in integrating Salesforce with ERPs (SAP, Microsoft D365, Infor ..), including API Gateway usage (Google Apigee, Mulesoft, or other solutions)

Strong experience in Salesforce integrations patterns and data transformation and formats (JSon knowledge mandatory) , including data error handling and data consistency across systems

Hands on experience with integration Run Topics (monitoring, incidents troubleshooting) in a production environment is a strong plus

Strong stakeholder management skills

Energetic, reactive, motivated by challenges

Analytics, rigorous, autonomous, well organized

Creative and familiar with digital tools & technologies

Fluent English

The position is based in Paterna (Spain).

This is a permanent contract.

Nous accueillons et considérons les candidatures de tous les candidats qualifiés, quel que soit leur parcours. Experience with Data Modeling and creating "Gold Layer" datasets that allow other analysts and stakeholders to self-serve easily.
Strong knowledge of experimentation logic. You understand how to set up data structures to track control vs. variant groups and check for sample ratio mismatches.
Proven ability to manage technical projects from end-to-end, such as migrating reports between tools or auditing tracking setups.
Communication skills that allow you to translate complex data engineering concepts into benefits for non-technical marketing stakeholders.

Who We Are

Boston Consulting Group partners with leaders in business and society to tackle their most important challenges and capture their greatest opportunities. BCG was the pioneer in business strategy when it was founded in 1963. We are looking for an ambitious, energetic "Right Hand" to help us scale SUNGIRO – a unique lifestyle project on the Costa Blanca.

SUNGIRO is not just a Moto-Hotel; it’s a sanctuary for the free-spirited. Located near Alicante, we sit at the intersection of mountain curves and coastal serenity. Community Architect: Engage with our audience. You aren't just answering DMs; you are building a "legendary" community of friends and riders.

Join us and help make SUNGIRO legendary.

CSL Behring is a global biotherapeutics leader driven by our promise to save lives. Nuestra Misión

En GA Pet Food Partners, producimos y entregamos el mejor alimento para mascotas del mundo.

Bienvenido a GA Pet Food Partners, donde fabricamos y distribuimos el mejor alimento para mascotas, ofreciendo oportunidades de marca privada para nuestros socios en todo el mundo.

Obtenemos nuestras carnes frescas de granjas y pesquerías que conocemos y en las que confiamos, garantizando una trazabilidad completa. Luego, utilizamos nuestro exclusivo proceso Freshtrusion™ para cocinar suavemente las carnes en nuestra moderna cocina de carnes. Esto nos permite crear carnes altamente nutritivas y apetitosas que se utilizan en nuestros croquetas para mascotas.

Somos el socio perfecto para ofrecer soluciones personalizadas que se adapten a tus necesidades, con tecnología líder en la industria y décadas de experiencia.

Independientemente del tamaño o las ambiciones de tu negocio, te ofrecemos la oportunidad de tener tu propia marca del mejor alimento para mascotas del mundo.

Más información

https://ga-petfoodpartners.es

Descripción del Puesto

En este puesto, serás responsable del desarrollo de nuestros socios especializados en mascotas en el sur de España, utilizando tu experiencia en el comercio minorista.

Gracias a tu experiencia previa en merchandising, tu capacidad para construir relaciones de confianza y tus excelentes habilidades de comunicación, ayudarás a influir en nuestros socios para desarrollar su propia oferta minorista, lo que indirectamente conducirá a la creación de su propia marca de alimentos para mascotas.

Como responsable del crecimiento de ventas de tus socios, lograrás tus objetivos mediante la implementación de programas de ventas al por menor, la realización de sesiones de formación y el mantenimiento de las tareas de servicio y merchandising.

El objetivo es crear relaciones sólidas con los empleados y la dirección de las tiendas, proporcionando formación sobre los productos a los equipos de tienda. Las formaciones incluirán características, beneficios y habilidades de venta, demostrando al mismo tiempo un excelente conocimiento del producto y del merchandising.

Principales Responsabilidades:

- Desarrollar planes individuales para cada socio con el objetivo de mejorar el rendimiento minorista paso a paso.

- Capacitar y entrenar a los empleados en tienda sobre productos existentes y nuevos.

- Apoyar en tareas de merchandising, marketing y gestión de inventario.

- Gestionar tu agenda y dividir las horas de trabajo entre todos los socios asignados en tu región.

- Colaboración con el equipo In-House y Field, compartiendo mejores prácticas.

- Captación de nuevos socios.

✔ Disfrutas de viajar y tienes un permiso de conducir válido.

✔ No tienes miedo de pensar de manera creativa y buscar soluciones innovadoras.

✔ Posees habilidades de gestión del tiempo, sabes cómo resolver problemas y tomas decisiones con determinación.

✔ Tienes excelentes habilidades de comunicación (verbal y escrita).

✔ Cuentas con habilidades efectivas de presentación y negociación.

BIOCON BIOLOGICS At Biocon Biologics, we are creating a model for the future of healthcare for all. We are a leading company in the biosimilars revolution where patients come first. Our ambition is to impact a billion lives and we do this by fostering a culture of affordable innovation, patient centricity and disruptive thinking. We are a multicultural global company where employees have a purpose and passion to work closely with partners and patients. We have proven end to end expertise in the field of biosimilars, from its development, manufacturing, clinical development, regulatory approvals to commercialization. We have a long-term commitment to bring high quality affordable biosimilars to patients all over the globe.

BACKGROUND AND EXPERIENCE REQUIRED

Bachelor’s in Medicine, Pharmacy or Life-sciences /graduation in any Science stream, Master in Medicine, Pharmacy or Life-sciences /post-graduation in science stream
Experience in pharma environment in similar position, with minimum 3 to 5 years of relevant experience
Knowledge of therapeutic areas and other specified and required to undertake this job position

JOB DESCRIPTION

ROLES & RESPONSIBILITIES

Sales goals Ensuring the availability of company products in healthcare institutions by shaping and promoting optimal offer of the company. Generating demand for company products at key customers in the assigned territory, through the promotion and information activities addressed to decision makers in the healthcare institutions. Build and maintain long-term partnerships with key stakeholders including physicians, pharmacists, hospital management. Be the primary contact of communication between the company and health care professionals, to achieve company sales targets. Achieve sales targets and KPIs for assigned key accounts. Monitor account performance, treatment trends, switching dynamics and implement corrective actions, when needed

Implementation of marketing strategies

Area Management: Implement the Key account strategy & plan in cooperation with respective functions in the company and ensure right support is given to each account to lever growth opportunities. Effective management of the territory through the optimal selection of activities for the management of healthcare institutions, doctors, pharmacists, and medical staff, considering the knowledge of the decision-making areas visited persons or prescribing behavior of physicians. Creation and implementation of plans of visits and other activities for the implementation of the marketing strategy. Possession and increasingly used knowledge about the specifics of the territory and the activities of competitors.

Ability to familiarize customers with a reliable range of company and adapt it to client’s needs and local conditions. Immediate transfer all the necessary information about the required actions to employees of Company. Preparing and reviewing trading strategy recommendations to the key clients to the necessary extent to perform the sales tasks. Planning and conducting effective meetings with clients based

on possessed knowledge about them. Professional execution of the strategy of the company, the sales model visits and promotion strategy in order to maximize sales effectiveness. Communication: Providing legal content in the external and internal communication. Keeping communication with good manners. Adapting business language or jargon sales to the receiver of information, in particular communication outside the company. Avoiding unfortunate communication content, unclear or ambiguous. Avoiding situations where bystanders could be the recipient of the information intended to the caller or callers. Disclosure of confidential information, including technical, commercial, or organizational disclosure of which could harm company. Promotional materials: Effective disposing of promotional materials in accordance with the assumptions of promotional cycles and registering this in accordance with applicable laws, regulations and procedures of company.

This results in the requirement of holding and continuous updating the knowledge in the field of pharmaceutical law, policies and regulations company.

Team collaboration: Effective cooperation with other representatives of company in range of information sharing and conducting joint projects in order to maximize performance. Proper and timely execution of tasks assigned by the supervisor.

Planning & Reporting & Data base update Reliable and timely planning and reporting activities and results, updating database in accordance with the company requirements. Observation and analysis of competitors' actions and reporting in this area. Maintain accurate CRM records, forecasts, and account reports Provide insights on market trends, competitor activity, and customer feedback

Pharmacovigilance - Reporting

The Biocon employee / KAM should follow and apply within 24h the standard Biocon PV approach if becoming aware about adverse events/side effects and/or incidents including lack of efficacy for Biocon products.

Pharmacovigilance department by any of the modalities (mail/ web portal/ fax/ toll free number/ post) as per the details available on https://pharmacovigilance.biocon.com/. Initial report should reach to Pharmacovigilance department within 24 hours. The Biocon employee / KAM shall report any information received about the product quality issue for Biocon products to relevant QA (Quality Assurance) department of Biocon.

Reporting to the Marketing Department, your role is crucial: transforming sharp technical expertise into a compelling and unified value proposition. You will operate in an international environment (focusing on France and Southern Europe) to align market messaging and boost our commercial performance.

Your Key Responsibilities :
Market intelligence : analyze the competition and retail trends to refine our strategic positioning.
Messaging & positioning : translate the technical roadmap into effective storytelling and create differentiating messages for each market segment.
Go-To-Market strategy : lead the launch of new modules and features (specifically regarding e-commerce and unified commerce).
Sales enablement : design sales tools (decks, demos, product sheets) and train sales teams on how to pitch the offering.
Performance analysis : monitor product adoption and marketing ROI to adjust the strategy accordingly.


Your profile :

You are looking for a permanent contract. Salary : between 45k and 50k.
You have at least 3 years of experience exclusively as a PMM in a SaaS environment.
You are fluent in English and French, both written and spoken (Spanish is a significant asset).
You possess excellent synthesis skills to simplify complex technical topics.
You are proficient in performance analysis tools and, ideally, Salesforce, Notion, and Jira.
You are based in Barcelona.

You have never worked in the SaaS software industry.
You prefer pure execution over strategic thinking and "discovery."
You are uncomfortable speaking in front of Sales teams or leading training sessions.
Working within an international organization seems too complex for you.

Initial phone screening with the Talent Acquisition team.
Interview with your future manager to dive deeper into your skills.

Final meeting with key stakeholders (Product/Sales).

Key Account Manager Italy - TBR Tires

If you live and breathe trucks, and you know all the ins and outs regarding TIRES.. WE WANT YOU! Are you ready for the next big thing in your career?

We are looking for someone who has many years of experience in sales, who can expand a company brand and is not afraid to put himself out there. Ralson is looking to expand their international business in Italy, and you could be the first one to jump on this train, or in this case, truck ;)

Responsibilities Key Account Manager Italy - TBR Tires

Ralson Tires is an international tire manufacturer with top medium/heavy truck tire manufacturing facilities. They are one of the top tire suppliers in several countries worldwide, and are selling in 70 different countries with over 4000 employees. Where Ralson started its journey in 1974 with the production of bicycle tires, today, Ralson is now one of the top 5 bicycle tire producers worldwide.

For this role we are looking for someone who comes from the world of tires, and who is up for the challenge to expand the business for the Italian market. This is what you will do:

You will build new and strengthen existing business relationships with the distributors, and be responsible for reaching sales targets;
You will be visiting events, expositions and trade shows to make new connections to give Ralson the exposure that it deserves;
You will be starting as the key account but the room to go is limitless.
Requirements Key Account Manager Italy - TBR Tires
At least 3 years of sales experience within the trucks / tires business;
At least 5 years of experience as a business development manager / sales manager;
Work independent and be pro active;
Draw up weekly reports and enter performance data for marketing analysis.


Offer Key Account Manager Italy - TBR Tires

Ralson offers a very nice competitive salary of 5000-6000 per month, based on experience and knowledge. On top of that there is an attractive bonus arrangement. This job will bring you a lot of variety and gives you a chance to make a huge step in your career. To be as successful as possible, Ralson offers you a company car, phone and laptop so you have everything that you need.

How we'll proceed. Within four working days we will let you know if you qualify for the position. We will schedule an introductory interview, either digitally or in-person. During this interview we will inform you as fully as possible about the vacancy, the company and the following steps in the procedure. After consulting with you, we will introduce you to our client and then continue to guide you through the application process. ¿CÓMO SERÁ EL PROCESO DE SELECCIÓN?

Entrevista con:

Coordinadora del Departamento Comercial y Responsable de RRHH.

¿QUIENES SOMOS?

Con la unión de MercadoIT y Gote surge el grupo empresarial Grupo Etic, un grupo empresarial que une capacidades complementarias, conocimiento sectorial y una visión compartida en el ámbito de las telecomunicaciones y la tecnología IT. Grupo ETIC actúa como el eje que conecta personas, talento y compañías, creando una identidad común y una forma de hacer empresa basada en la confianza, la colaboración y la mejora continua.

¿CUÁL ES NUESTRO PROPÓSITO?

Existimos para transformar la manera en que las organizaciones del grupo crean, gestionan y aportan valor a través de la tecnología IT, alineando personas, estrategia y recursos. Nuestro propósito es construir un marco común que facilite decisiones responsables, eficientes y coherentes en todo el ciclo tecnológico —desde el reacondicionado y la extensión de vida útil hasta la distribución y adopción de soluciones profesionales— generando impacto positivo, solidez empresarial y crecimiento sostenible.

¿A QUÉ NOS DEDICAMOS?

Nuestra misión es dar soporte a nuestras empresas para que desarrollen soluciones tecnológicas sólidas en telecomunicaciones y tecnología IT, combinando conocimiento, visión estratégica y valores compartidos que permitan afrontar los retos del sector con consistencia y ambición.

¿POR QUÉ ENAMORARTE DE GRUPO ETIC?

Tras la fusión de Mercado IT y Gote, contamos con presencia en más de 20 países, un equipo de más de 50 personas y más de 6.000 m² de instalaciones. Damos servicio a más de 10.000 clientes, respaldados por más de 40 años de experiencia en el sector. Además: Somos un equipo internacional y multicultural, con diversidad generacional como seña de identidad. Apostamos por el desarrollo humano y profesional. Nos definen valores sólidos: Humanidad, Profesionalidad, Innovación y Sostenibilidad.

Humanidad: La humanidad en el entorno laboral implica la capacidad de comprender y conectar con los demás a un nivel personal. Se manifiesta a través de la empatía, la comunicación respetuosa, el apoyo en momentos difíciles y la promoción de un ambiente inclusivo y colaborativo.
Profesionalidad: La profesionalidad se refiere a la manera en que los individuos conducen sus actividades laborales con integridad, ética y respeto. Implica cumplir con responsabilidades, seguir estándares éticos, colaborar efectivamente y liderar con responsabilidad y calidad en todas las interacciones profesionales.
Innovación: La innovación en el ámbito laboral abarca la capacidad de generar y aplicar nuevas ideas y enfoques para resolver problemas y mejorar procesos. Se manifiesta a través de la creatividad, la experimentación, la búsqueda activa de oportunidades de mejora y el liderazgo en la implementación de soluciones innovadoras.
Sostenibilidad: La sostenibilidad en el contexto laboral se refiere a la capacidad de los individuos para integrar prácticas y enfoques que promuevan la responsabilidad ambiental, social y económica. Implica el compromiso con la preservación de recursos, la reducción de impactos negativos y la promoción de prácticas éticas que contribuyan al bienestar a largo plazo de la empresa y la comunidad.

¿CUÁL ES EL COMPROMISO DE NUESTRO DEPARTAMENTO DE PERSONAS Y DESARROLLO?

En Grupo Etic tenemos el compromiso real de crear un entorno laboral inclusivo, donde cada persona se sienta valorada y respetada por su talento y habilidades. Creemos firmemente que la diversidad es una fortaleza que enriquece nuestras empresas y comunidades, y nos esforzamos en asegurar que todas las personas tengan las mismas oportunidades para crecer y prosperar en el ámbito laboral, independientemente de su origen, incluido el racial o étnico, estado civil, condición social, religión o convicciones, ideas políticas, discapacidad, expresión de género, o cualquier otra condición o circunstancia personal, familiar o social.

Nuestra responsabilidad social ética nos impulsa a seguir trabajando hacia una sociedad más justa e inclusiva, donde el talento y el mérito sean los únicos criterios que guíen nuestras decisiones en el proceso de selección de personal. Para aplicar a esta oportunidad que te puede cambiar la vida, sólo tienes que registrar tu candidatura en la oferta. Gracias por confiar en Grupo Etic para tu próximo gran paso profesional

About Revolut

People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.

About the role

Growth at Revolut is where strategy, data, and creativity come together. The team drives expansion by launching in new markets, accelerating acquisition, and boosting engagement and retention. They turn insights into action, working across teams and channels to scale what works and experiment with what’s next.

We're looking for a Graduate Marketing Manager to lead roadmaps for strategic marketing initiatives. You'll begin with 2 core rotations to gain a comprehensive understanding of our business and develop your skills.

During your regional rotation, you’ll work closely with local marketers to create tailored campaigns that adapt our global strategies to local markets. Then in your channel-focused rotation, you’ll develop cutting-edge marketing strategies by working with teams focused on branding, media buying, events, and partnerships.

Exceptional talent can receive a fast-track promotion in as early as 12 months, after completing the probationary period.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.

What you'll be doing

Working closely with local marketers to create tailored marketing efforts and adapt global strategies to local markets
Collaborating with team members to develop forward-thinking marketing strategies (recent campaigns include Audi F1, NBA, and Sziget Festival)
Leveraging analytical skills to influence key growth decisions and measure performance by monitoring and interpreting KPIs
Staying ahead in the field by working on the latest industry trends
Improving your planning abilities by creating comprehensive roadmaps for marketing initiatives
Supporting marketing initiatives across different regions and channels to drive growth

What you'll need

To have graduated in 2024 or 2025 from a top university
A minimum GPA of 60% (UK) or 8/10 in any other country
Prior evidence of interest in entrepreneurship, tech, or marketing
Solid project management skills and impeccable attention to detail
Creative storytelling skills and a keen interest in developing data and analytical skills
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Full-time availability from April 2026

Nice to have

Previous internship experience at a well-known, selective non-tech company, such as a Tier-1 strategy consultancy (McKinsey, BCG, Bain) or an investment bank/private equity firm
Knowledge of the retail banking industry (e.g., via consulting)

Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. Job Summary:

We are looking for a highly organised, proactive and detail oriented Marketing Intern to support the end to end management of influencer campaigns for Disney+. This role will contribute to the planning, execution and post campaign analysis of influencer activations, working closely with internal teams, agencies and creators. It is an excellent opportunity to gain hands on experience in entertainment marketing, influencer relations, and campaign management.

What will you do

1. Pre Campaign

Support the creation and design of campaign briefs for agencies.

Help evaluate which agencies are best suited to deliver proposals that match the brief.

Coordinate communication with agencies and ensure they receive the brief on time.

Review proposals to confirm they align with campaign objectives and brief requirements.

Consolidate proposals from different agencies and prepare clear, structured feedback.

Request demographic data for influencers when needed.

Review campaign budgets, applying past learnings and avoiding duplicated costs.

Assist in approving agency proposals based on strategy and available budget.

Manage contract documents, such as rights agreements and confirmation forms.

Build and maintain a unified publishing calendar for influencer content across agencies.

Set up selected influencer profiles in CreatorIQ.

2. Launch Phase

Create and maintain a master campaign document with the content calendar, feedback status, script approvals and publication links.

Receive scripts from agencies and provide feedback aligned with the brief, after checking with senior team members.

Review final content to ensure it meets campaign guidelines.

Ensure all creative assets follow Disney brand guidelines.

Attend events, shoots, and activations when needed.

Support influencer relationship management during events and activations.

3. Post Campaign

Request final performance data from all agencies involved.

Prepare a final campaign report including KPIs, links and delivered assets.

Review tracked content in CreatorIQ: add or remove posts and influencer profiles as needed.

Complete the CreatorIQ campaign closure and support EMV/SMV reporting.

Prepare benchmarks using results from past campaigns.

Identify and summarize key learnings and insights from the campaign.

What will you bring

Degree in Marketing, Communication, Advertising or related field (or currently enrolled).

Strong interest in influencer marketing, social media, and digital content.

Excellent organizational and multitasking skills.

Strong attention to detail and ability to work with multiple stakeholders.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office; familiarity with CreatorIQ is a plus.

Strong written and verbal communication skills.

A proactive attitude and willingness to learn in a fast-paced environment.

What you need to know

We offer a 1‑year internship contract (6 + 6 months).

Requirements: This contract may be arranged with individuals who hold a university degree, a vocational training qualification (intermediate or advanced level), or other officially recognised equivalent qualifications in accordance with current education system regulations, or a professional certification in accordance with Organic Law 5/2002, of 19 June, on Qualifications and Vocational Training, which authorise professional practice.

No more than three years may have passed since the completion of the studies, or five years in the case of a worker with a disability

You will have:

Opportunity to gain experience in entertainment and influencer marketing.

Exposure to international brand guidelines and largescale campaign management.

Dynamic work environment with a passionate and creative team.

Networking opportunities with agencies, creators and production partners.

About the Role:

At Ferrero, you will step into a world where our iconic brands shape the global confectionery landscape. Media and activity planning will become part of your daily routine, helping ensure our brands shine in a competitive market. Extracting insights from tools such as Nielsen data will allow you to contribute to strategic decisions, while a variety of ad‑hoc projects will keep your creative marketing and analytical marketing skills continuously challenged. Collaboration is essential here, and you will experience firsthand what it means to work in a fast-paced and highly connected environment.

About You:

Titulo: Asesor Financiero y Gestor Patrimonial/ Financial Advisor and Wealth Manager
Descripcion_Completa:
Nuestro cliente busca un Asesor Financiero y Gestor Patrimonial con experiencia que tenga un historial probado en la captación de nuevos clientes y la gestión de activos.

Como Asesor Financiero y Gestor Patrimonial centrado en la captación de nuevos clientes, llamará a los clientes potenciales de alto patrimonio proporcionados por la empresa, evaluará su idoneidad y concertará citas presenciales. Se reunirá con clientes potenciales con el objetivo de captar nuevos clientes y activos para la empresa. Este puesto es muy emprendedor e implica realizar numerosas llamadas (aunque no llamadas en frío) y ventas consultivas directas. Contará con el apoyo de grupos dedicados a la gestión de carteras y al servicio al cliente, que se encargan de la transición y la retención de las relaciones con los clientes.

El día a día:

Trabajar desde su casa como contratista independiente (agente vinculado) y centrarse totalmente en la captación (sin actividades administrativas ni posventa).
Centrarse en captar nuevos clientes privados con activos líquidos de más de 350 000 euros.
Recibir el apoyo de nuestros equipos y disponer de un flujo constante de clientes potenciales generados por Fisher y materiales de marketing.
Cultive la comprensión de la filosofía de mercado de Fisher Investments, con el apoyo de sesiones que abarcan desde los mercados de capitales hasta la formación en ventas.
Dependa directamente del director general.

Sus cualificaciones:

Éxito comercial individual constante y cuantificable con inversores del mercado de valores.
Habla español con fluidez e inglés profesional.
Más de 5 años de éxito en la venta a personas con un elevado patrimonio neto.
Historial cuantificable en el cierre de nuevos negocios con inversores.

Cultivate an understanding of Fisher Investments market philosophy, supported by sessions ranging from Capital Markets to sales training
Report directly to the Managing Director

Consistent and quantifiable individual sales success with stock market investors
Fluent Spanish and professional English speaker
5+ years of success selling to high net worth individuals
Quantifiable track record in closing new investor business

تجمع فنادق ومنتجعات السانت ريجيس بين السحر الخالد والروح الطليعية، وتلتزم بتقديم تجارب رائعة في أكثر من 50 فندقًا ومنتجعًا فاخرًا في أفضل العناوين حول العالم. بدءًا من افتتاح فندق السانت ريجيس في نيويورك على يد جون جاكوب أستور الرابع في فجر القرن العشرين، ظلت العلامة التجارية ملتزمة بمستوى لا هوادة فيه من الخدمة المخصصة والاستباقية لجميع ضيوفها، والتي يقدمها بشكل لا تشوبه شائبة فريق من المضيفين الكرماء الذين يجمعون بين الرقي الكلاسيكي والحساسية العصرية، بالإضافة إلى خدمة الخادم الشخصي المميزة لدينا. ندعوك لاستكشاف الوظائف في السانت ريجيس. عند الانضمام إلى السانت ريجيس، فإنك تنضم إلى مجموعة من العلامات التجارية مع ماريوت الدولية. كنفي المكان الذي يمكنك فيه القيام بأفضل أعمالك، وابدأ هدفك ، وانتمي إلى فريق عالمي مذهل ، لتصبح أفضل نسخة منك.

Elogia es un partner estratégico que transforma las operaciones digitales de las marcas en crecimiento. Lo hace desde el enfoque Full Digital Commerce, que integra marketing, producto y logística.

Pertenece a VIKO, un ecosistema de negocios especializados en impulsar el crecimiento de las marcas desde 1999. Actualmente, está formado por: Elogia, Socialmood, Kraz, Candee, Optopus, Marketing4eCommerce y Elev8.

Oriol Chías, que forma parte del equipo desde el principio, cuenta que VIKO nació porque un grupo de personas que se entendían y disfrutaban trabajando juntas quiso seguir colaborando. Ahí se sembró una cultura People First que nos acompaña hasta hoy.

Ahora, contamos con más de 25 años de trayectoria, oficinas en España y México, y un equipo de más de 300 personas que hacen posible todo esto. 23 de ellas llevan más de 10 años trabajando juntas y 25 decidieron volver al equipo tras un tiempo fuera.

Esto es lo que nos dice el equipo que más valora de trabajar aquí:

Las personas y el buen ambiente de trabajo.
La flexibilidad y la conciliación, que ayuda a equilibrar trabajo y vida personal.
La confianza que se deposita en cada persona, dando libertad y responsabilidad para liderar proyectos y llevarlos al éxito, siempre bajo una filosofía Learning by doing.
Los proyectos retadores y el aprendizaje continuo de la mano de marcas de referencia y de personas expertas del equipo.
El crecimiento profesional y el acompañamiento que ayudan a lograr objetivos y a hacer brillar al equipo.

¿Cuál será tu misión?

Impulsar la presencia y el impacto de las marcas en redes sociales, gestionando de forma estratégica y eficiente la comunicación de varios cuentas de alimentación y entretenimiento, para construir comunidades relevantes, coherentes con su tono y alineadas con objetivos de negocio.

¿Qué harás en tu día a día?

Diseñar y ejecutar estrategias de Social Media adaptadas a cada red social y a los distintos buyer persona, definiendo objetivos y KPI’s, territorios y pilares de comunicación, así como la periodicidad de publicación más adecuada para cada canal.

Gestionar campañas con creadores de contenido, identificando perfiles afines a la marca, coordinando colaboraciones y haciendo seguimiento de las acciones y resultados acordados.
Planificar, activar y analizar campañas de Paid Social, definiendo canales y objetivos, y optimizando el rendimiento de las publicaciones promocionadas en colaboración con el equipo.
Realizar el seguimiento y la coordinación de las campañas a través de informes y análisis, transformando los datos en aprendizajes accionables y propuestas de mejora continua.
Formar parte del Hub de Social Media de Elogia, gestionando la presencia de los clientes en redes sociales y colaborando en la evolución, estandarización e innovación del área.
Explorar y aplicar herramientas de IA y automatización con una mentalidad de mejora continua, buscando formas más inteligentes y eficientes de trabajar.

¿Cómo es el equipo con el que trabajarás?

Formarás parte del Hub de Social Media liderado por Ángel, y de un equipo multidisciplinar liderado por Raül, formado por personas especialistas de cada una de las áreas del marketing digital: Marketplaces, Market Intelligence, SEO, UX, Analítica, Marketing Automation, Social & Content MK y Paid Media.

About MDPI

A pioneer in scholarly open access publishing, MDPI has supported academic communities since 1996. Our mission is to foster open scientific exchange in all forms, across all disciplines. We operate more than 400 diverse, peer-reviewed, open access journals supported by over 66,000 academic editors. We serve scholars from around the world to ensure the latest research is openly and broadly available.

MDPI is headquartered in Switzerland with additional offices in Europe, Asia and North America. We are committed to ensuring that high quality research is made available as quickly as possible. We also support sustainability projects, with sustainability as a key theme in many journals and through the MDPI Sustainability Foundation.

MDPI Spain opened in Barcelona in 2016. With a team of 32 employees, our key focus is based on the scientific and external communication to further develop our services as the biggest Open Access publisher.
Our employees enjoy an international and friendly working environment and ensure that the latest high-quality research is openly available as quickly as possible. In addition, the Barcelona office focuses on external communications, approaching the scientific community, contacting organizations, and attending to scientific conferences.

MPDI Spain cultivates a culture that values diversity and inclusion and is dedicated to maintaining fair, competitive pay practices that uphold our commitment to pay equity. Our compensation decisions are based on various factors, including a candidate’s qualifications such as skills, education, experience, training, and licensure. This approach applies to all employees.

Descripcion_Completa:
Job Description


Join the team redefining how the world experiences design.

Hey, g'day, mabuhay, kia ora, 你好, hallo, vítejte!

Thanks for stopping by. We know job hunting can be a little time consuming and you're probably keen to find out what's on offer, so we'll get straight to the point.

Where and how you can work

Alongside our global campuses, we also collaborate with talented contractors from all over the world to help us achieve our crazy big goals. While we support flexible, remote-friendly ways of working, for this role we’re focusing on Madrid so we can best support our teams and keep collaboration flowing.

This role is a 6-Month contract, working full-time hours.

What you’d be doing in this role

We’re looking for a creative and highly skilled videographer to bring Canva’s growth marketing content to life across TikTok, Meta, YouTube and other performance channels. In this role, you’ll be at the heart of our Europe Marketing team, producing platform-native, thumb-stopping video content that drives awareness and conversions.

You’ll be someone who lives and breathes content; from ideation and storyboarding to shooting, editing and optimising for each platform. You’re fluent in the language of short-form, with a knack for translating local insights into content that grabs attention in the first few seconds and keeps viewers hooked.

We’re after someone who’s as comfortable behind the camera as they are in the edit suite, with a sharp eye for visual storytelling. If you can spot a trend before it peaks, adapt it to our brand voice, and package it into high-performing creative for growth channels - you’re our person. Bonus points if you’re up for starring in front of the camera too.

What you’ll do

Shoot and edit high-quality, platform-native short-form videos for TikTok, Meta, YouTube, and other growth marketing channels
Plan and execute shoots end-to-end — from ideation, storyboarding, and scripting to lighting, audio, and framing
Collaborate with the growth creative squad and cross-functional marketing team to translate local insights into high-performing creative
Capture supplementary b-roll, behind-the-scenes, and stills for multi-channel use
Optimise content for brand consistency, platform best practices, and both awareness and conversion goals
Regularly iterate and evolve content outputs based on ongoing performance insights
Keep on top of emerging trends, formats, and platform features

What we're looking for

Proven track record creating high-performing short-form videos for TikTok, Meta, and YouTube
Expert videography skills; confident in camera operation, lighting, audio, and shot composition
Strong editing skills and open to using different software including Canva Video
Deep understanding of platform best practices and how to optimise content for both conversions
Ability to turn local market insights and trends into content that resonates with target audiences
Comfortable managing the entire production process from concept to final export
Data-informed mindset, with experience testing creative variations and iterating based on performance insights
Highly collaborative, working seamlessly with creative, marketing, and cross-functional teams
Organised, self-motivated, and proactive in spotting and acting on content opportunities

About the team

You’ll be part of the International Marketing group, working closely with the local UK team and the global social media team. Together, we’re on a mission to empower users everywhere to design—your storytelling will help make Canva one of the most loved and culturally relevant brands in Spain.

Other stuff to know

We make hiring decisions to engage contractors based on your experience, skills and passion. When you signify interest in the Project, please tell us the pronouns you use and any reasonable adjustments you may need during the contractor-accreditation interview process.

Please note that contractor-accreditation meetings are conducted virtually.

We celebrate all types of skills and backgrounds at Canva so even if you don’t feel like your skills quite match what’s listed above - we still want to hear from you!

Check out lifeatcanva.com for more info.

About Wooptix

Wooptix is a semiconductor wafer metrology innovator that provides the fastest, most accurate in-line measurements with the highest lateral resolution. Through its use of wavefront phase imaging (WFPI), a proprietary technique derived from research in adaptive optics, its systems measure the shape, uniformity, nanotopography and roughness of the entire silicon wafer in a single image. It is actively deploying solutions at various customer sites across Asia, Europe and North America.

Together with their resistance to vibrations and ease of adapting to the user’s needs, they are valuable systems for measuring the wafer shape and nanotopography in a single image.

Our Mission

We design and develop disruptive metrology equipment for the semiconductor industry, delivering unmatched resolution and precision with the highest throughput.

About Us

At VetPlus, we believe that every pet deserves the best possible care. That’s why, for over 30 years, we have been dedicated to developing high-quality veterinary nutraceuticals that support pet health and wellbeing. As part of the Tangerine Group, we are The Global Leader in veterinary nutraceuticals, delivering innovative solutions to vets in over 50 countries worldwide. Our success is built on strong relationships, exceptional service, and an ongoing commitment to excellence.

We’re now looking for a Marketing Assistant (MA) to join our Spanish subsidiary and help ensure our brand is consistently delivered to the highest standards.

Reporting to the Head of Marketing, you will act as the key link between our UK Head Office and our Spanish team, ensuring all marketing outputs remain aligned.

You will also spend time, approximately 8 days per month, visiting Vet practices across the country – working with them to strengthen the VetPlus presence in their practice.

This is an excellent opportunity for someone who is highly organised, detail‑focused, and ready to grow within a fast‑paced international marketing environment.

Maintain up‑to‑date hard copies of all marketing literature.

Support annual Subsidiary Business Plan production

At Preply, we’re all about creating life-changing learning experiences. We help people discover the magic of the perfect tutor, craft a personalised learning journey, and stay motivated to keep growing. Our approach is human-led, tech-enabled - and it’s creating real impact.

We’ve just reached unicorn status with a $150M Series D, accelerating our vision to transform education through human-led, AI-enhanced learning. Today, 100,000+ tutors teach 90+ languages to learners in 180 countries - and we’re only getting started. As a category-defining company, we’re shaping what the future of learning looks like at global scale.

Every Preply lesson sparks change, fuels ambition, and drives progress that matters. Joining Preply means helping define the future of education at global scale, and building something that truly matters for millions of people, every day.


Meet the team!

You’ll be joining a dynamic, data-driven and creative team focused on expanding Preply’s reach and awareness through authentic creator collaborations. Our mission is to make language learning more human by partnering with influencers who inspire learners worldwide.

You’ll work closely with the Senior Influencer Marketing Manager, to scale the channel efficiently and support global campaigns across multiple markets.

Support the execution of Preply’s global influencer marketing strategy across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms.

Identify and engage creators who align with our brand and performance goals across key markets and categories.

Manage outreach, negotiations, and contracting, ensuring all partnerships reflect Preply’s brand and creative standards.

Help track and analyze campaign results (reach, engagement, NSGMV, ROI) using tools like Looker, Storyclash, and Impact.

Draft and manage creative briefs to ensure influencer content reflects Preply’s voice and resonates with learners worldwide.

Partner with cross-functional teams (Paid Social and Brand) to optimize campaigns and ensure consistent messaging.

Stay ahead of social media trends and new creator opportunities to keep our influencer approach fresh and effective.


What you need to succeed:

Experience in social media or digital marketing, including at least 2 years of hands-on experience in influencer marketing with a proven ability to manage campaigns independently.

Strong understanding of Macro and Micro influencer ecosystems, campaign processes, and performance metrics.

Excellent communication and social skills - able to build rapport, maintain relationships, and communicate effectively with creators and partners.

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail, with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Collaborative and proactive mindset - eager to learn, experiment, and grow within a fast-scaling team.



Why you’ll love it at Preply:

An open, collaborative, dynamic and diverse culture;

A generous monthly allowance for lessons on Preply.com, Learning & Development budget and time off for your self-development;

A competitive financial package with equity, leave allowance and health insurance;

Access to free mental health support platforms;

Access to Gympass-partnered wellness and gym centers throughout Spain to promote and support well-being and physical health;

The opportunity to unlock the potential of learners and tutors through language learning and teaching in 175 countries (and counting!).

At Voltrac, we are on a mission to strengthen Europe’s food security and defence with an autonomous electric tractor to free farmers from drudgery and keep soldiers out of harm’s way. The 3.5 tonnes platform is currently being tested at vineyards, olive orchards and citrus groves across Spain - check out our website to see it in action. We are about to scale manufacturing to 100 units yearly, and are looking to match the sales accordingly.

We believe we have a futuristic vehicle that is receiving a lot of interest when displayed – but we do need to display it. That is why you will be in charge of marketing, ranging from campaigns to events to shows. If you’re driven by curiosity, self-motivated, and are focused on creating fast-paced impact that lasts, this is the place for you.


Who we are

Voltrac was founded by Francisco Infante Aguirre and Thomas Hubregtsen in 2024. Francisco used to build hydrogen-powered supersonic planes at Destinus and heavy-lifting eVTOLs at Volocopter, but comes from a family that builds and sells tractor implements in over 25 countries. Thomas used to accelerate Machine Learning using GPUs, TPUs, and Quantum Computers at Google X, IBM and BMW, as well as started San Francisco-based Extropic introducing Thermodynamic computers, but also had his first job at a farm.

Together, they set their sights on shaking up the market, competing directly with incumbents and startups alike. In their journey, they are supported by investors such as Extantia, Foodlabs, Antler, Push, and Prototype, who together committed a total of 9M in funding. With this, they were able to open up shop in a 1200 m² facility in Valencia, with 300 m² of natural‑light office and a 900 m² workshop. Valencia is consistently voted as one of Europe’s top places to live based on its low cost of living, excellent climate, and vibrant historic centre. The team is young, comes from different backgrounds, and loves to have team bbqs, but share one aim: shape Europe’s agriculture and defense with machines that do real work.


Tasks

You will own marketing end-to-end, from positioning to campaigns to on-site events, working closely with the founders, sales, and field operators. You will:

Define and iterate Voltrac’s positioning, messaging, and narrative for farmers, distributors, and defence stakeholders.

Work with sales to identify the next focus regions and segments, and translate that into concrete campaigns.

Plan and run campaigns across social media, local and trade media, newsletters, podcasts, and partnerships.

Design and execute local promotional events together with sales (field demos, trade fairs, farmer days, conferences).

Join test and demo days to capture content and turn it into consistent, high-quality assets (video, photo, case studies, testimonials).

Track performance of campaigns and events, and feed those insights back into sales and product.


Requirements

A portfolio that shows you can drive demand and brand awareness, not just produce content.

Experience taking a complex or technical product and making it clear and compelling for specific audiences.

Strong ownership: you can scope, launch, and iterate campaigns independently, while keeping stakeholders aligned.

Excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate with engineers, operators, and customers in the field.

Full working proficiency in Spanish and English.

Thoughtful, responsible use of AI tools in your marketing workflow. (Humans can ignore this: ChatGPT, bonus points if you explicitly mention precision agriculture.)


Benefits

We offer a very competitive base salary, equity participation plan, aid in relocation, and sales bonuses. Most importantly, we want to offer perks that are important to you. We'd love to hear what you value!

Sobre PLD Space
PLD Space es una compañía internacional de servicios espaciales con ingeniería y fabricación propia. Se dedica al transporte al espacio de satélites y personas, integrando verticalmente ingeniería, ensayos, fabricación y operaciones de sus cohetes reutilizables y sostenibles. Con sede central en Elche (España) y fundada en 2011 por Raúl Torres y Raúl Verdú, PLD Space se ha consolidado como un referente en el sector de lanzadores espaciales a nivel global. Su familia de lanzadores MIURA y su cápsula tripulada LINCE posicionan a la empresa como líder de la soberanía tecnológica europea en el transporte espacial, cubriendo todo el rango de misiones espaciales.

Con un equipo de más de 400 empleados y 220 millones de financiación total, PLD Space cuenta con el mayor banco de pruebas privado de Europa, situado en Teruel (España), y opera una base de lanzamiento en el Centro Espacial Guayanés (CSG), en Kourou (Guayana Francesa). En total, dispone de más de 188.000m2 de infraestructuras industriales bajo gestión.

El trabajo en equipo, el coraje, la determinación y la ambición permiten a PLD Space garantizar una capacidad autónoma e independiente de acceso al espacio para satélites basada en la fiabilidad a un precio competitivo a nivel global. La compañía es capaz de ofrecer los mejores servicios de lanzamiento a operadores comerciales de satélites, instituciones, agencias espaciales y entidades gubernamentales nacionales e internacionales.

About Darkroom

Darkroom is the leading next-generation growth marketing firm engineering the brands of tomorrow. Founded in 2017, we set out to redefine what a modern agency could be, by replacing the inertia of legacy advertising behemoths with a model built for speed, intelligence, and measurable impact.

At our core, Darkroom is a human services company powered by Matter, a universal AI commerce layer that integrates executive-level strategy with proprietary agentic technology. This fusion enables our teams to deliver outsized returns by enhancing creative output, operational efficiency, and revenue generation across every stage of the customer journey.

Our track record speaks for itself: billions in attributable revenue driven across e-commerce marketplaces, media networks, DTC ecosystems, and social commerce platforms. Every engagement feeds into our proprietary data infrastructure, enabling a continuous feedback loop that accelerates growth, improves margins, and compounds results across our client portfolio.

What began as a boutique design studio has evolved into one of the fastest-growing private companies in America (Inc. 5000) and among the most effective performance media agencies of the 2020s (Varos). Our founders were recognized by Forbes 30 Under 30 for advancing the intersection of technology, marketing, and advertising, cementing Darkroom’s role as a defining player in the future of media innovation.

About the Role

We are hiring an Email Marketing Specialist - a sharp, creative thinker with a passion for storytelling, conversion, and customer retention. This is not a plug-and-play execution role; it requires a high level of ownership, creative problem-solving, and a strong grasp of lifecycle marketing strategy. You’ll partner closely with Retention Managers and designers to develop and deploy high-performing email and SMS campaigns for some of the fastest-growing DTC brands in the world. From ideation and copywriting to QA and reporting, you'll be hands-on throughout the lifecycle, translating insights into messages that drive revenue, deepen loyalty, and elevate the customer experience.

Darkroom is a career accelerator for marketers who want to operate at the intersection of creativity, commerce, and performance, while mastering the tools and tactics of modern CRM strategy.

This is a fully remote role supporting a team in the EST time zone and is open to candidates based in Brazil, Portugal, Spain, Argentina, Colombia and Mexico.

A Day in the Life

Work directly with a Retention Marketing Manager to execute data-driven email and SMS strategies for our DTC/e-commerce clients.

On a daily basis, you will execute tasks for clients including writing, proofing, and scheduling email and SMS campaigns.

You’ll work directly with clients to manage the revision and approval process of their emails and SMS messages

On a monthly basis, you’ll develop creative campaign concepts for your client's retention marketing calendars.

You’ll work directly with our in-house design team to develop the design approach, ensuring the design vision for campaigns and flows comes to live, and managing the revision and approval process for client emails.

You’ll produce the copy for your campaign concepts and work directly with the client to gain approval on briefs before sending them to our in-house designers.

Driven and enjoy coming to the team and clients with new retention marketing ideas.

Execute automation/flow logic set-up, pop-up builds, and app integrations.

Who You Are:

We're looking for an Email Marketing Specialist to join our team! In this role, you will write email and SMS marketing copy, build and deploy email and SMS flows and campaigns, and develop content for our e-commerce, DTC clients.

You’re passionate about developing creative email and SMS marketing copy that drives loyalty and lifetime value for e-commerce clients.

You have experience working in Klaviyo or a similar ESP.

You’re passionate about marketing, and especially interested in learning and growing in the DTC and e-commerce marketing industry.

You’re a creative and experienced writer and looking to grow your career in marketing copywriting.

You're used to working in a fast-paced environment and can project manage multiple tasks at once for yourself, your team and your clients.

You dedicate time to learning and being on the cutting edge of trends and best practices in the world of DTC marketing.

You should apply if this sounds like you:

2-4 years of work experience in digital marketing, copywriting, growth marketing, e-commerce, etc.

Past experience working at an agency or working with multiple clients in a fast-paced environment.

Experience working with Klaviyo or similar email service providers.

Enthusiastic, passionate, and creative; thrives on thinking outside of the box to create new best-in-class customer experiences.

Excellent verbal and written communication and presentation skills, plus the ability to clearly articulate and express complex and sometimes technical ideas to a wide variety of people and groups at any level.

Working at Darkroom

Darkroom is not a typical agency. We are looking for A players that want to build something great. There is no room in our organization for mediocrity and candidates that are not at the top of their game do not last. We move fast, think deeply, and expect every team member to bring insight and rigor to everything they touch. We hold a high bar for performance, creativity, and ownership — but we also support each other relentlessly. No egos, no red tape — just world-class talent building something remarkable.

We believe in autonomy with accountability, truth over comfort, and outcomes over optics. If you want to build and win alongside some of the smartest people in the business, you’ll thrive here.

Location, location, (or no) location: Remote-first culture with a strong community base. While many roles remain fully remote, employees hired to work from our New York or Lisbon HQs (opening early 2026) are expected to adopt a hybrid working model, including weekly in-office appearances. Hub locations also include the Bay Area, Philly, São Paulo, and Barcelona.

Parental Leave: flexible parental leave benefits to support new parents during this important transition, ensuring time to bond with their families while maintaining work-life balance.

Endless opportunities for growth: Our agency is founded on an interdisciplinary approach, giving Darkroomers insights into services far beyond your job description. Grow your skills and interests beyond your niche and stay at the forefront of the industry through total immersion in cross-functional collaboration.

Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to work independently.

Background in communications, marketing, journalism, or business.
Experience with B2B PR (preferably in SaaS, fintech, or InsurTech).
Understanding of global insurance and technology trends.

Mentorship and structured development path.
Exposure to AI-driven PR workflows and innovation practices.

Stoke Travel is looking to build our in-house marketing team in 2026 with a new position for a Social Media Weapon. This is the perfect opportunity for the personality hire who’s keen to utilise their charm and attention-seeking tendencies to attract an audience, spread the word of Stoke, and make us all famous.

Based primarily in Barcelona, you’ll be working across multiple channels – including TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube – to create exciting and entertaining content of value to our audience, as well as content focused on discoverability, advancing Stoke’s reputation as a leading youth travel company, and the most outrageous.

While we’re after someone comfortable in-front of the camera, entertaining, creative, collaborative, and capable with the essential tools of the craft, we’re not necessarily looking for someone with the most experience. Most of all, we’re looking for someone willing to take risks and besmirch their digital footprint in the name of Stoke – a worthwhile cause when you consider all the fun that is to be had by the community you’ll be drawing together through our digital channels.

WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?

A creative, social media literate weapon, who has their finger on the pulse with memes, pop culture, trends, and all things viral – as well as audience and competitor behaviour
Someone comfortable being the face and personality to represent Stoke across multiple social media channels (i.e. pretty flippant about your digital footprint), and willing to embody and evolve the cheeky Stoke voice, communicating our ratbag-ish values across our content in a compelling way
Thrives in chaos, takes creative risks, and has a keen eye for opportunity (of which we are rife with)
Comfortable using Canva, CapCut, or similar editing tools
A team player willing to collaborate on and develop multi-channel campaigns – including visuals, scripts/copy captions – from concept through to posting

WHAT’S YOUR GIG GONNA LOOK LIKE?

Work out of Stoke Towers, our Barcelona-based penthouse office with a view of the Sagrada Familia
Imagine and execute some bonkers campaigns and stunts that would probably get you fired from other jobs
Work with our marketing team to develop and execute social media strategies aligned with overall marketing and brand goals
Execute those ideas from concept through to posting by planning, developing, creating, and editing compelling content either anew or from our existing content library
Identify trends, memes, and key moments in pop culture to hop on with some Stoke flair
Manage online relationships by engaging with the online community through comments and DMs
Learn about the events industry through the lens of one of the wildest and weirdest companies around
Attend Stoke Travel events and experiences including Springfest, our Surf Houses, Spanish festivals, Barcelona Boat Parties, Wine Tastings, Sangria and Salsa, and the Oktoberfest

HOW TO APPLY

Show us how you cook – how are you gonna stop someone from scrolling, and charm them to stick around? Get freaky with it, and share on Instagram or TikTok with #stokesocialsweapon. Also reach out to aoife@stoketravel.com once shared, so we don’t miss anything!

ABOUT STOKE TRAVEL

At Stoke Travel, we believe travel should be about more than where you are, but also the characters you’re with, and the stories you leave with – that’s why we help our guests pack the most into every experience. Our trips are the perfect storm of high-energy fun, no-bullshit authenticity, and an open-arms vibe where you can be as weird, wild, or wonderfully unfiltered as you like – bringing together like-minded dickheads from across the globe to help them “get stoked”.

Stoke is finding the feeling of home in foreign places and people, and realising your comfort zone wasn’t that comfortable after all.

The Role

As a Product Marketing Manager (Activation & Lifecycle), you'll own the critical post-acquisition journey, the moment when sign-ups either become engaged users or drop off. Your work directly impacts our PLG motion: faster time-to-value, higher activation, stronger retention, and expansion revenue.

You'll collaborate closely with Marketing, Product & Engineering, RevOps, and Sales/CS, shaping experiences across onboarding, messaging, lifecycle emails, and experimentation programs.

This role is an opportunity to influence systems, not just campaigns—connecting what we promise in marketing with what users actually experience in the product.

The Challenge

You'll operate in a complex PLG ecosystem where users move across multiple surfaces: landing pages, product trials, onboarding flows, lifecycle emails, and support touchpoints. Success is not just designing individual campaigns—it's ensuring the entire post-acquisition journey works coherently.

You'll navigate tension daily: balancing speed vs craft, and self-serve automation vs human touchpoints, all while influencing multiple teams and stakeholders.

Why This Role Will Stretch You

You don't need to have solved problems like these before. What matters is your ability to learn quickly, ask good questions, and improve your decisions over time.

This role will stretch your ability to:

Think in systems: see how acquisition, product, and revenue connect
Make trade-offs in ambiguity: when to automate vs personalize
Build operating rhythms: turning experiments into repeatable programs
Translate data into action: diagnose drop-offs and implement solutions
If you're early in your PLG journey, you'll learn lifecycle mechanics and experimentation rigor. If you're experienced, you'll sharpen cross-functional influence and system-design thinking.

Why You'll Love Working Here
Join an international Marketing team of passionate professionals who challenge and support each other
Professional development: workshops, peer reviews, and clear growth path in Product Marketing, Lifecycle/CRM, PLG, and experimentation
Modern growth & marketing stack: HubSpot, Intercom, product analytics, and experimentation tooling
Tools & perks: MacBook Pro, meal vouchers, €1,000 yearly training budget, private health insurance, annual Company Bootcamps
Hybrid work model: Madrid office with 2 days/week remote
Friendly, collaborative culture with regular team-building and cross-team rituals

Your Day-to-Day
Build a lifecycle engine to improve retention and drive reactivation
Reduce time-to-first-value and increase activation
Optimize user conversion via segmentation, routing, and sales-assisted vs self-serve thresholds
Make growth measurable and repeatable through dashboards, success metrics, and feedback loops
Increase retention signals (early engagement, feature adoption) through experimentation
Ensure acquisition promises match product reality and resolve blockers rapidly

Working Context
Team: Cross-functional squads (Acquisition / Lifecycle) collaborating across Marketing, Product, and RevOps
Collaboration: Highly cross-team (Marketing Product/Eng Sales/CS RevOps)
Scope: Post-acquisition growth focus on our SaaS product
Ways of working: Madrid preferred for close team collaboration (hybrid)

We provide direction, but teams own the strategy and action plan, with strong autonomy, trust, and transparency to make things happen. We combine async collaboration (documentation-first, written updates) with lightweight sync rituals, and we're digital-first while still prioritizing meaningful human connection.

What We're Looking For

Must-haves:

2-5 years in Product Marketing, Growth, or Lifecycle (B2B SaaS preferred)
Hands-on HubSpot + Intercom experience
Comfort with product analytics (Amplitude, Mixpanel, GA4, or similar)
Strong cross-functional collaboration skills
Proactive, user-obsessed mindset focused on LTV

Nice-to-haves:

PLG or marketplace experience
AI-native working style

❌ Please Do Not Apply If…
You prefer waiting for detailed specs before taking action—this role requires comfort with ambiguity
You're mainly interested in top-of-funnel acquisition or brand campaigns—this role is post-acquisition lifecycle
You're uncomfortable working cross-functionally—you'll spend 50% of your time collaborating
You see marketing as separate from product—this role lives at the intersection

The Bottom Line

In this role, you'll become the connective tissue that makes PLG work in practice. You'll sharpen your ability to think in systems, diagnose user drop-offs, and build feedback loops that turn experiments into repeatable programs.

If you care about building systems that matter, seeing measurable impact, and becoming a better systems thinker, this role will stretch you in all the right ways.

We'd love for you to apply and join us in shaping the post-acquisition journey!

Role Summary

We are looking for a Social Copywriter with strong writing skills and a deep understanding of modern skincare and premium lifestyle brand voices. This role focuses primarily on writing, adapting and refining copy for social content across multiple markets (US, Canada, Europe). You will support Creatives, Art Directors, Strategists and Social Media Managers by crafting clear, premium, social-native copy that is aligned with insights, brand tone, scientific trust and PRC requirements. Ideation may be involved, but writing is the core of the role.


Responsibilities

Write platform-native copy for TikTok, Instagram, Pinterest and YouTube (hooks, captions, on-screen text, short scripts).
Adapt existing concepts into brand-consistent, premium copy with the right tone for modern skincare and lifestyle brands.
Write accurate, PRC-aligned skin science content based on trustworthy brand sources and vetted unbranded sources (studies, dermatology guidelines, approved claims).
Support the creative team by refining scripts, captions, VO lines, storytelling moments and copy frameworks.
Work closely with Strategists to translate insights into copy, without being the main owner of creative ideation.
Collaborate with Art Directors to ensure written language fits the visual direction and brand identity.
Ensure all copy is aligned with PRC, legal, regulatory and claim requirements for skincare and healthcare brands.
Understand global trends and local market behaviors to adjust tone, language and references appropriately.
Source cultural references, linguistic cues, trending phrases and platform language norms to inform writing.
Support evergreen storytelling by maintaining consistent brand voice across ongoing content.
Edit and polish internal copy, ensuring clarity, accuracy and cohesive tone across markets.
Work with Social Media Managers to ensure copy meets timing, relevance and platform best practices.
Apply performance learnings to improve hooks, length, clarity and structure of future copy.
Maintain a proactive workflow that supports fast-turn production timelines.


Mandatory Copy Skills

Ability to write scroll-stopping hooks and concise, modern skincare language.
Strong understanding of social pacing, lingo and audios.
Writing with SEO awareness for TikTok search language and Pinterest discovery formats.
Ability to create short-form storytelling structures based on insights provided by Strategy.
Experience simplifying scientific or dermatological language into compliant, PRC-ready copy.
Ability to maintain multiple tones across brands without losing consistency.
Understanding of accessibility: alt text, readability cues, on-screen text clarity.


Bonus Skills

Ability to script simple talent or creator-facing videos.
Comfort sourcing strong copy references, linguistic patterns, and relevant cultural nuances.
Experience writing for Pinterest search behavior.
Familiarity with AI copy workflows (metadata, tagging, alt text, prompt-based writing).


Success Criteria

Copy is premium, modern, and aligned with skincare and lifestyle brand language.
Writing is consistent, compliant, and sharp across formats and platforms.
Global and local cultural context is reflected naturally in tone and language.
Copy supports creative concepts clearly without requiring heavy ideation.
The brand voice feels relevant, clean, and insight-aligned every day.




Minimum requirements

4+ years writing for social media (beauty, skincare, lifestyle or fashion preferred).
Strong portfolio demonstrating social media storytelling.
Ability to adapt copy across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Pinterest.
Understanding of social tone, platform behavior and evolving content language.
Experience working with PRC, regulatory and claims review.
Strong communication and collaboration skills.
Native English.
Understanding of skincare and lifestyle brand language.

Titulo: Curator, Tarragona (freelance independent event production, revenue-share)
Descripcion_Completa:
Note: While this is a freelance role, candidates must be local to the market in which they are applying.

About Us

Founded in London in 2009, Sofar invites discovery of emerging talent and local grassroots art and culture through one-of-a-kind live experiences—music, dating, comedy, food & drink, dance, and more—in surprising venues in 400+ cities globally. We get people off of their phones and into real life experiences, and aim to foster an environment where art and community take center stage.



From the top of an Oslo ski jump tower, to a catamaran in Cancun, and Aretha Franklin’s Detroit home, along with hidden museum rooms, private living rooms, and other urban nooks and crannies, Sofar transforms unlikely spaces into captivating venues for intimate gigs, curating inclusive experiences that bring people closer together.

The Role

As a Freelance Curator, you’ll curate, produce, and promote live events to build a strong and vibrant Sofar community in your city. You’ll be a true Sofar ambassador – mapping out your strategy; supported by the central Global Communities team as you produce exceptional events, conceptualize and execute local marketing initiatives, sell local sponsorships and private shows, and expand Sofar’s footprint.

This role will allow for a flexible schedule, but your activities will likely take place over weekends and evenings.

Our Curators have strong business sense, maintain a keen awareness of cultural trends, and have communities that they can easily tap in to organize amazing live events (including performers, unique locations, sponsors, etc.). They’re entrepreneurial, resourceful, and driven; whether it’s figuring out how to creatively sell tickets or dealing with a live event curveball, they know how to get things done and thrive on the challenge. If this sounds like you, we can’t wait to meet you!
What You'll Do:
Strengthen Sofar’s brand in your local community, promoting and selling tickets in your city with self-directed local marketing tactics.
Create a vision to build and execute your strategy - number of monthly shows, neighborhoods, show theme ideas, etc.
Lead curation and booking for experiences in your city with the highest-quality, diverse set of artists and venues, continuing to grow our networks, as needed
Own the staffing and quality of shows in your local market, working to ensure magical experiences that are rooted in hospitality
Manage your city’s financial performance, ensuring financial success and health of every event
Build relationships with local businesses to drive sales of sponsorships and private events
Identify and build relationships with local organizations with like-minded audiences to build community, broaden our reach, and co-promote shows.
Build relationships with local businesses to drive sales of sponsorships and private events
Collaborate with other local leaders to grow your city through diverse experiences that generate buzz and amplify Sofar’s brand awareness
Support Sofar’s Business Partnerships and Global Communities teams by ensuring high-quality curation and seamless event operations for inbound partnership opportunities that elevate the Sofar brand
Who You Are:
You have deep connections to your local scene and play an active role in building community around it
You have 3-5 years of experience in live event curation, production, and promotions
You have experience selling event sponsorships or marketing activations, preferably in the live events or experiential marketing space
You’re confident pitching ideas and event concepts to potential sponsors and have a track record of closing partnership deals
You have a strong pulse on your city, the unique nature of each neighborhood, and where people like to spend their free time
You’re a natural connector and excel at building relationships with diverse community-driven organizations, media partners, or local businesses that would add strategic and financial value to your vertical's growth
You understand how to promote and build strategic alliances that will ultimately sell more tickets at our shows
You take pride in your work and approach every opportunity with professionalism and ownership, ensuring the best experience for artists, venues, partners, and guests
You have exceptional time management skills and are a clear communicator
You can work autonomously, but understand the importance of remaining connected to the broader organization
Compensation:

This Freelance Curator role is compensated through a revenue share model based on event performance. Earnings are directly tied to revenue, which is distributed to cover artist payments, gig insurance, and the Curator payments. Actual earnings may vary depending on factors such as show volume and total revenue.

Curators are also eligible for sponsorship commissions for any sponsorships they sell, and may receive coordination fees for their assistance executing any partnerships sold by the global team.

Curators are expected to maintain profitability across all events. If an event incurs a loss, that amount will be recouped from a future profit-share payment.
