Ready to turn SEO into measurable business growth?

TransPerfect are looking for a strategic, data-driven SEO Specialist to join their Digital department to help global brands expand their international reach. Working cross functionally and client side across EMEA, you’ll shape and deliver high-impact SEO strategies and drive real results across global markets.


OVERVIEW

The SEO Specialist plays a key role in the expansion and growth of the division. They work alongside Sales to pitch digital marketing services and data-driven strategies to existing and prospective clients. They build strong client relationships by providing sound strategic guidance, ensuring excellence in delivery and reporting tangible results.

They have a good understanding and hands-on experience in all areas of search engine optimization (SEO), are pivotal to the successful planning and execution of international SEO strategies across industries ranging from B2B to B2C. Projects range from short-term to ongoing engagements, they will help boost online presence and reach a wider international audience through organic search.

The SEO Specialist is strategic and data-driven, commercially minded and client-focused. They find it easy to explain SEO concepts and strategy to clients and colleagues. They possess excellent cross-cultural communication, organization and time management skills to successfully manage client stakeholders and internal teams across the US & EMEA. Always focusing on quality, performance, profitability and growth.

This position reports to the Digital Marketing Strategist and assists with strategic data-driven account growth, while being responsible for strategy definition, on-going performance optimization and key performance indicator (KPI)/return on investment (ROI) reporting.

DESCRIPTION

Work alongside the account management to help grow international SEO/performance services to both existing and prospective clients by contributing to client pitches and strategic proposals
Mentor and aid junior team members in both client services and production departments
Lead research and strategy (audits, competitor analyses, keyword research, content gap analyses) and present findings and recommendations confidently to senior colleagues and clients
Oversee successful execution of multiregional strategies by our global digital production teams, liaising with client HQ, local stakeholders and agency partners if needed
Own performance monitoring and reporting of assigned accounts: work with the digital data analyst to set up performance monitoring dashboards and deliver monthly performance reports with insights and recommendations
Continuously research and select the best tools and templates to support our SEO offering and incorporate those into existing workflows and processes
Keep up to date on SEO trends, technologies and market leaders, and share this knowledge with colleagues and clients
Complete all other tasks that are deemed appropriate for this role and assigned by the manager/supervisor

REQUIRED SKILLS

Superior written and spoken communication skills in English
Independent, self-motivated, results-oriented and dynamic with careful attention to detail
Exceptional problem solving and critical thinking skills
Ability to work effectively under pressure to meet tight deadlines and challenging goals
Demonstrate an ability to: multitask in a fast-paced environment, work well with people from a variety of different backgrounds and cultures, build relationships with clients and co-workers, work independently and as part of a team and take active measures to solve problems and commit to a high level of service
Willingness to travel to offsite client or sales meetings
Confident making strategic recommendations, and comfortable in client calls, meetings and presentations
Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook)

REQUIRED EXPERIENCE AND QUALIFICATIONS

Minimum bachelor’s degree or its equivalent
Minimum 4 years of experience in SEO
Experience client-side in the retail or travel industries or agency-side servicing international clients
Confident with coordinating internal teams, competent giving feedback and having difficult conversations with colleagues and clients
Confident making strategic recommendations and competent in client calls, meetings and presentations
Experience auditing websites, performing keyword research and competitor analyses to determine the best strategic approach to improve SEO performance
Strong IT literacy, including proficiency in Excel and PowerPoint and experience with industry tools such as SEMRush, Moz, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, Google Search Console and Web Analytics platforms (Google Analytics and/or Omniture)

DESIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE

Knowledge of a second language is a plus
Knowledge of MS Project
Experience in digital copywriting and conversion optimization
Experience in genAI custom assistant/agent creation for SEO workflow and processes

Titulo: Técnico de Gestión de CRM y Marketing Automation
Descripcion_Completa:
Trabaja en remoto desde cualquier lugar del mundo

1MIB es una empresa fundada en el año 2006, especializada en el desarrollo de negocios en el ámbito digital y de eCommerce de varios sectores como los de automoción, turismo, hogar y multiservicios, etc.

También somos un headhunter de selección de talento en remoto para trabajar desde cualquier lugar del mundo para empresas a nivel mundial.

Funciones del compañero que deseamos incorporar:
Su principal misión consistirá en gestionar las diversas herramientas (CRM) en la nube que utilizamos para gestionar los flujos comerciales y los procesos operativos internos de nuestros distintos proyectos, en particular aquellos que tienen que ver con la gestión de usuarios, leads y clientes.
Administrar el CRM, incluyendo la configuración de permisos, administración de usuarios, gestión de roles y perfiles, configuración de seguridad y gestión de datos, flujos y procesos en base a la necesidad de los distintos departamentos de la empresa.
Configurar el CRM para optimización de los procesos de captación y gestión de contactos que acceden por diferentes vías como: formularios de captación, whatsapp, Social Media, telefonía tradicional,…
Coordinar con el resto de departamentos las necesidades de integración de información y reporting para mejorar la productividad, automatismos, conversión,…
Vincular diferentes herramientas como ERP’s, sistemas de emailing, drip marketing, customer journey analysis, CRO…para mejorar la conversión y satisfacción del usuario y cliente.
Extraer experiencias y revisar flujos y resultados de customer journey y conversión para optimizar continuamente los flujos de usuarios y comportamiento de clientes.
Análisis y modelización de datos estructurados y no estructurados.
Qué ofrecemos:
FlexWork. tú eliges dónde trabajar: desde tu casa, la playa, montaña,.. 100% remoto, pero ATENCIÓN, para trabajar en tiempo real con el resto de compañeros, deberás estar disponible en horario de lunes a viernes de 12:00 a 21:00 hora española continental (visita para conocer equivalencia con tu país: 24timezones.com/Madrid/hora ).
No es un trabajo individual en el que se te asignan tareas autónomas sin relación con otros compañeros, sino que trabajarás en un entorno colaborativo con otros profesionales distribuidos por todo el mundo de distintas nacionalidades.
Disponemos de un ecosistema de trabajo con tareas bien definidas, orientado a alcanzar objetivos, al aprendizaje continuo, y a la excelencia en los resultados.
Dispondrás de formaciones internas, mentoring y coaching continuo.
Interesantes oportunidades de crecimiento profesional, intelectual y económico.
Tú decides cómo cobrar tu remuneración: en el lugar que elijas de entre más de 100 países y múltiples modalidades como transferencia bancaria, depósito en efectivo, etc.
Aprenderás a desarrollar diferentes negocios desde cero: Análisis y Benchmarking de competidores, creación de la propuesta de valor, prototipo y MVP (Producto Mínimo Viable), pruebas y testing, creación plan Comunicación y Marketing, lanzamiento y kick off, etc.
Requisitos del candidato

Requisitos técnicos del candidato:
Titulación: formación específica en temas de Marketing online, análisis de información y/o CRM. Alternativamente, gran experiencia autodidacta en esos ámbitos. Lo importante es el conocimiento REAL y OPERATIVO. NO DESEAMOS TEÓRICOS, sino que precisamos a compañeros que hayan CONFIGURADO ELLOS MISMOS una plataforma de CRM o/ y de Marketing Automation.
IMPRESCINDIBLE: tener conocimientos en lead nurturing, drip marketing, y gestión de flujogramas y de configuración (no sólo como usuario) en CRMs tales como SugarCRM, SalesForce, VTiger, ActiveCampaign, Zoho, HubSpot, PipeDrive, AmoCRM, etc.
IMPRESCINDIBLE experiencia de al menos 2 años trabajando como configurador, no únicamente como usuario, de algún CRM avanzado (que tenga funciones de Marketing Automation)
IMPRESCINDIBLE experiencia de al menos 2 años trabajando con grandes volúmenes de información, bases de datos, análisis y reporting.
Un buen nivel de inglés será muy bien valorado.
Interés en programación, como por ejemplo Python, será también muy bien valorado.
Deberías haber tenido contacto o experiencias con áreas comerciales y de operaciones en cualquier momento de tu vida profesional para ser consciente de las implicaciones interdepartamentales de la gestión de flujos internos y externos.
Idealmente deberías tener experiencia integrando plataformas en la nube como ERP’s, CRMs, addons y plugins, etc, en particular con WordPress, por ejemplo con Zapier, Integromat, Automate.io, IFTTT, etc.

Requisitos actitudinales y psicológicos del candidato:
Es muy bien valorado que dispongas de al menos un año de experiencia teletrabajando, al menos en modelos híbridos.
Es imprescindible que seas una persona muy bien organizada, metódica, meticulosa en tu trabajo, y fiable en cuanto a plazos y consecución de objetivos. Por favor, abstenerse personas poco organizadas, olvidadizas, chapuceras o impuntuales.
Deberás ser una persona habituada a trabajar en equipo con compañeros de diversos orígenes y perfiles; y a evaluar y entender las implicaciones de tu trabajo para el resto del proyecto y compañeros.
Dispondrás de interés y habilidades para el trabajo y aprendizaje multitarea, o sea, realizar y aprender de varias tareas simultáneamente. Este no es un puesto para personas que deseen rutinas estrictas e inamovibles, o realizar monotareas, sino todo lo contrario.
Este no es un trabajo para un especialista que sólo conoce un aspecto o departamento de una empresa o proceso, sino para alguien que quiere conocer y participar en globalidad de un proyecto en todas sus vertientes.
Deberás disponer de gran flexibilidad y curiosidad intelectual para aprender continuamente de diferentes ámbitos del mundo digital. Si no te apasiona aprender de temas digitales y técnicos, éste no es tu puesto.
Deberás estar habituado a trabajar en remoto, con las exigencias de disciplina que ello conlleva (tener un horario de comienzo y final de la jornada, objetivos y metas semanales que cumplir, etc).

Colaborar con el equipo técnico para llevar a cabo las soluciones definidas.

Dar soporte a usuarios finales durante y después de la implementación.

Entender cómo se gestiona un proyecto Salesforce de principio a fin.

Qué requisitos previos tienes que tener:

Interés real por la consultoría funcional, el negocio y los sistemas CRM.

Capacidad analítica y ganas de aprender.

Buenas habilidades de comunicación y trabajo en equipo.

Actitud proactiva y curiosidad.

Overview:
Are you interested in joining a dynamic and international team of professionals to transform education? IE University's Marketing Department is looking for a Web Project & SEO/GEO Specialist to join its team!
The Web Project & SEO/GEO Specialist will ideally have previous experience (2-5 years) working in Web & Digital Marketing. The candidate shall be familiar with development aspects (although not necessarily owning an engineering or developer background) and have an eye for detail in design and usability.
Focusing on the technical aspects of searching (SEO and GEO), the Specialist will optimize our website infrastructure for Google and AI-powered search and boost IEU's organic visibility, paid performance, and conduct ongoing site audits. The SEO and GEO Specialist will manage IEU's site architecture and structured data, schema markup, improve site speed, fix crawl errors, and prioritize mobile friendliness and help deliver a content and technical strategy for AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Llama, etc.), focusing on direct answers, relevance, and context to rank in AI summaries.
Knowledge of best web marketing practices (SEO, GEO, AI, CRO, UX), as well as data reporting and analytics, is highly desirable.
Why IE University?
With 50 years of experience and founded by and for entrepreneurs, IE University has turned business education on its head through disruptive teaching. We count on high-level faculty who bring real-world experience into the classroom and foster a hands-on approach to learning.
Our Purpose

Veeva Systems is a mission-driven organization and pioneer in industry cloud, helping life sciences companies bring therapies to patients faster. As one of the fastest-growing SaaS companies in history, we surpassed $2B in revenue in our last fiscal year with extensive growth potential ahead.

At the heart of Veeva are our values: Do the Right Thing, Customer Success, Employee Success, and Speed. The Role

We are in search of exceptional product marketing talent to help us promote highly scalable, true multitenant cloud solutions that are significantly impacting life sciences. Our focus is on customer satisfaction, employee success, and growth.



The Product Marketing Associate Manager/Manager will be an important addition to our growing marketing team and will help support demand generation, field enablement, and customer marketing activities. This person will collaborate with global Marketing, Product Strategy, Product Management, Sales, and Professional Services to drive Veeva’s growth and our customers’ success.


What You’ll Do

Support go-to-market programs for new offerings, market segments, and geographies
Gain a deep understanding of buyer needs and how Veeva solutions meet those needs
Develop product messaging to be used across all media and customer engagement channels
Partner closely with product and market strategy to gain a deep understanding of product vision, upcoming functionality, and determine how best to communicate this externally
Build product awareness through PR, article placements, and social media
Proactively identify customer success and bring those stories to life for use in marketing
Create content (e.g. thought leadership, videos, website copy, blog posts, infographics) to articulate the benefits of the solution to the marketplace

Requirements

Able to work independently with little management oversight
Exceptional written and oral communication skills with a demonstrated ability to develop clear, concise, compelling messaging and a persuasive writing style
Strong presentation skills
Fast learner, detail-oriented, and must enjoy fast-paced work environments
Proven ability to build relationships with other teams and across all levels
Self-motivated, innovative, collaborative, creative, and analytical
Strong project management skills with exceptional attention to detail

Nice to Have

Life sciences industry experience
Fluency in French or Spanish

Perks & Benefits

The chance to work with a genuine market leader
Incredible support from the wider team, and a best-in-class tech stack to help you be successful in your role.
Work anywhere policy – You can utilise our office spaces or work remotely when you need to.
Health & wellness reimbursements
Veeva Giving 1%
#RemoteSpain

Veeva’s headquarters is located in the San Francisco Bay Area with offices in more than 15 countries around the world.

As an equal opportunity employer, Veeva is committed to fostering a culture of inclusion and growing a diverse workforce. Diversity makes us stronger. It comes in many forms. Gender, race, ethnicity, religion, politics, sexual orientation, age, disability and life experience shape us all into unique individuals. We value people for the individuals they are and the contributions they can bring to our teams.

If you need assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need when applying for a role or in our recruitment process, please contact us at talent_accommodations@veeva.com.

Work Where It’s Best for You

Work Anywhere means you can work in an office or at home on any given day. It’s about getting the work done in the way and place that works best for each person. This applies across all locations and departments.

Work Anywhere does not mean work at any time. We have predictable core hours where employees are generally available for meetings and collaboration. Employees are focused and available during core hours.

We invest in our offices to make them places where our employees like to go. If you work in the office three or more days a week, you will have a dedicated office workspace. Our offices function as hubs to draw people in, create social bonds, and where random connections and mixing of ideas happen. We’re investing more in offices, culture, and offsite meetings, not less.

Product teams are organized in regional product hubs for optimal collaboration and live within a time zone of their hub. Our current product hubs are located in Pleasanton, Columbus, Boston, Kansas City, New York City, Raleigh, and Toronto. We create opportunities for teams to get together in person regularly.

Customer-facing roles, such as Sales and Professional Services, live near and/or travel to their customers.

When an employee moves within a country it does not cause a change in salary. Where you live impacts you and your family. Not knowing if your compensation will change if you move can cause stress and uncertainty for everyone. We wanted to eliminate that.

Work at Veeva. Work where it’s best for you.

The Regional Concierge Manager oversees the Partner Concierge team within their delivery hub and is accountable for delivering a consistent, high‑quality partner experience across all assigned markets. People Leadership & Operational Oversight

Lead, coach, and direct a team of in-market Concierge Specialists, aligned to Global strategy.

Oversee partner allocation, ensuring balanced workloads within the 1:15 service ratio model.

Ensure language coverage and time‑zone alignment across all served markets.

Monitor and uphold delivery quality, conducting QA reviews, and performance calibration.

Manage regional escalations and support issue resolution involving SAP market units.

Delivery Excellence

Ensure consistent execution of partner cadences, enablement, and planning cycles.

Conduct roll‑up reporting on partner performance, marketing activity impact, and engagement.

Drive operational standards, playbook adherence, and SAP marketing process compliance across the hub.

Track and report hub-level KPIs, such as partner satisfaction, engagement levels, and marketing / sales metrics.

Stakeholder Engagement

Act as the primary liaison between SAP regional teams, global governance, and the Concierge Specialist delivery pod.

Communicate program updates, process changes, and best practices from SA

The Partner Concierge Specialist is responsible for providing high‑touch SAP marketing support to an assigned portfolio of partners (15:1 ratio of partners per Specialist). This role helps partners plan, execute, and optimize marketing campaigns aligned to SAP’s programs, ensuring measurable pipeline impact, better use of SAP marketing resources, and ongoing partner enablement.

This is a hands‑on delivery role requiring strong communication skills, digital marketing experience, and the ability to manage partner relationships across multiple countries and cultures, within regional teams, and as a part of the larger global initiative led by Accenture.

Key Responsibilities

Partner Relationship Management

Serve as the primary marketing contact for assigned partners.

Conduct weekly or bi‑weekly partner check‑ins, guiding campaign planning, execution, and optimization.

Deliver monthly enablement sessions and support partners’ adoption of SAP tools and processes for marketing and pipeline management.

Build trust-based relationships with partner marketing leads and relevant SAP stakeholders.

Marketing Execution & Optimization

Support partners in designing and prioritizing campaigns aligned to SAP messaging, audiences, and GTM motions.

Program Support

Ensure partners understand and adopt SAP marketing programs, playbooks, and campaign kits.

Collaborate with local Concierge Manager to maintain delivery quality and identify risks.

Document partner interactions and progress using agreed program tools.

KPIs & Insights

P Global Partner Marketing to the regional team and its supported partners.

Track and influence partner KPIs such as activities executed, leads influenced, funnel health, and campaign outcomes, using existing SAP systems where relevant.

Identify partner capability gaps and recommend SAP training or enablement paths.

Review campaign performance and provide actionable insights to improve ROI and pipeline contribution.

Conduct and prepare partner performance reports within provided frameworks.

Assist partners in utilizing and managing SAP-provided marketing funds.

Partner with SAP regional teams to align on strategic priorities and coordinate escalations.

Strategic Support

Identify regional trends, risks, and opportunities, relaying insights to global governance and SAP stakeholders.

Contribute to continuous improvement initiatives, including tooling, templates, and reports.

Excellent relationship-building and communication skills.

With the guidance of the Director of Marketing Communications, design and implement the hotel’s social media and e-commerce strategy with KPIs.

Conduct competitive analysis of studies on competition and provide recommendations on content changes for the resort’s social channels.

Plan and execute social media influencer campaigns, working closely with local and/or international influencers / KOLs and with the Public Relations agency.

Collaborate create and execute social media campaigns that will generate leads, drive quality traffic and fans/follower’s engagement.

Prepare monthly reports on social media for distribution to department heads and executive committee.

Work closely with various departments to produce quality content for social media.

Plan, organize and oversee all social media photography / videography sessions.

Experience and education

Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, eCommerce Management, or a related field.

Minimum of 2 years of solid experience in a similar role, preferably within the luxury hospitality sector (resort experience is considered a plus).

Technical Skills

Excellent communication skills with an articulate and compelling communication style.

Strong writing ability, capable of adapting tone and style to different audiences and communication platforms.

Proven project management skills with a demonstrated ability to manage multiple priorities effectively.

Strong attention to detail and organisational skills.

Creative mindset with the ability to think innovatively and work with flair and imagination.

Strong communication skills in English and Spanish, both written and spoken.

Sobre nosotros

Chiesi es un grupo biofarmacéutico internacional centrado en la investigación, con 90 años de experiencia, presente en más de 30 países y con sede en Parma, Italia. Más de 8.000 empleados en todo el grupo comparten un mismo propósito: promover un mundo más saludable para nuestras personas, pacientes y el planeta. Este propósito nos impulsa a investigar, desarrollar y comercializar medicamentos innovadores en nuestras principales áreas terapéuticas. Descubre más aquí.

En Chiesi pensamos en las futuras generaciones, impulsando una innovación sostenible y con propósito. Esto fomenta una cultura de fiabilidad, transparencia y comportamiento ético en todos los niveles. Como Benefit Corporation y empresa certificada B Corp, hemos integrado la sostenibilidad en nuestros estatutos y medimos continuamente nuestro impacto.

La diversidad y la inclusión están en el corazón de quienes somos. Creemos que nuestras diferencias nos hacen más fuertes. Somos un ecosistema dinámico de personas apasionadas y talentosas, unidas por valores sólidos y perspectivas únicas que nos ayudan a desafiar continuamente el statu quo para mejorarlo.

Puig is a major player in the worldwide fashion and beauty industry. We have a wide portfolio of well-known luxury brands across fashion, fragrance, makeup, skincare, and wellness. Founded more than 100 years ago, Puig is a family-owned company with a long-term commitment to our brands and stakeholders.

The Opportunity

Join our dynamic Lifestyle Brands department and collaborate closely with the cross-functional Benetton and Shakira Perfumes teams. You’ll play a key role in executing global digital strategies, with a strong focus on social media and content production.




You will be responsible for managing the development of content across key digital touchpoints — including organic and paid social media, e-tailing, website, and email marketing. You will ensure smooth coordination between all involved teams and help strengthen our brands’ presence across LATAM.

What you'll get to do
Coordinate with internal departments (Product & Marketing Development, Communication, Operational Marketing, Local Markets) to support the implementation of digital marketing strategies for Benetton and Shakira Perfumes, with a primary focus on the latter.
Lead digital content productions (photo, video, CGI, 3D, copy, translations etc.) with a strong focus on social media platforms such as TikTok and Instagram.
Brief agencies and oversee the creation of Digital Launch Books for new product launches and key seasonal campaigns (e.g., Christmas, Mother’s Day etc.), ensuring alignment with global brand strategy and aesthetics.
Ensure on-time delivery of all key assets and support local teams with requests related to digital brand guidelines.
Drive social media acceleration for both brands by staying on top of trends and inspiring creativity.
Brief and supervise specialized agencies in developing monthly content plans for Instagram and TikTok (4 accounts in total).
Ensure alignment between the global content plan, local market initiatives, and influencer activations led by the Communications team.
Oversee the email marketing plan for Shakira Perfumes, ensuring correct and timely send-outs.
